evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Ensuring compliance with architecture, security and access standards together with IT, Architecture and Security teams
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Governance, compliance, security standards, and data quality/reliability dominate with no velocity or speed language present.
evidence.domain_risk: vegetable seed breeding for agricultural and food production
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: An agricultural seed breeding company's internal BI reporting has limited, recoverable consequences without financial-reporting or regulatory exposure stated.
evidence.collaboration_width: product owners; analytics engineers; IT specialists; business stakeholders; IT, Architecture and Security teams
evidence.data_team_maturity: empower self-service BI for teams across the organization; global data platform
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: A named global data platform, dedicated Architecture and Security teams, and self-service BI already in place across the organization signal a mature function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Designing, developing and maintaining advanced data models and analytics products using tools like Databricks, dbt and Power BI
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific named tools (Databricks, dbt, Power BI, DAX, Azure DP203) and concrete governance scope show exactly what the role involves.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: strengthening data-driven decision-making across Enza Zaden worldwide
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role serves internal self-service BI consumers across the whole organization rather than one specific commercial function.
evidence.autonomy_level: Leading complex analytics and reporting initiatives with a mid- to long-term horizon
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Leading initiatives with a long-term horizon, coaching colleagues, and strategic-yet-pragmatic framing are unambiguously strategic.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools or AI-consuming infrastructure anywhere in the posting.
evidence.testing_framing: Experience with DevOps practices such as version control, testing and CI/CD for data products
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing appears in the requirements list as a DevOps practice without a dedicated ownership verb, placing it as tool_listed.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Ensuring compliance with architecture, security and access standards
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: security, access, and compliance standards are named as a responsibility, but framed around platform governance rather than regulatory or stakeholder-trust risk.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Improving data quality, reliability, performance and cost efficiency through lifecycle management
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Mix of designing new analytics products and improving/scaling the existing global data platform.
